topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: After rebuild on omniflow: ML forecast must run when FORECAST_ML_ENABLED=true; crypto portfolio must show Bitunix values (not €0 with only holdings count 7); Grafana cashflow/forecast panels must show non-zero balances; planning must allow deleting plans and feel intuitive; native currency display with EUR conversion at valuation time.

stats-forecast sidecar compose profile; forecast/meta ML path; wealth/crypto EUR pricing and FX banners; Bitunix futures holdings; Grafana cashflow dashboard SQL; PlanningPage plan delete UX and adjustment target types; public or CEX price feeds for FX.

Operator set BITUNIX_ENABLED_FUTURES=true, FORECAST_ML_ENABLED=true, STATS_FORECAST_URL=http://stats-forecast:8090, GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL embed path; rebuild may have recreated flow-finance-ai+grafana only; DEC-0049 opt-in ML and DEC-0080 crypto subtotal rules must not regress; US-0014 planning UX already DONE — treat delete-plan gap as new defect.

GET /api/v1/forecast/meta shows ml_status available not sidecar_unavailable when ML enabled; GET /api/v1/wealth crypto.subtotal_eur and exchange cards non-zero when Bitunix connected with 7 holdings; Grafana cashflow balance forecast non-zero for funded account 114; DELETE /api/v1/plans/{id} reachable from UI; FX banner only when assets truly unpriced.

Operator confirms ML banner gone and ML overlay available after sidecar healthy + Full sync; crypto tab shows portfolio values and understandable Bitunix summary; Grafana cashflow matches API forecast; can delete unwanted plans from /planning; OIDC/external profile regression pass.

decomposition.rationale: Operator bundled post-rebuild omniflow symptoms into one production smoke failure cluster (ML, crypto, Grafana, planning). Vertical split deferred — shared operator gate (deploy all external services + Full sync) and overlapping wealth/forecast surfaces.
decomposition.split_axis: none — cluster bug with sub-defects AO–AT

boundaries.BUG-0014: ML sidecar deployment gap, crypto EUR display, FX/native currency contract, Grafana cashflow zeros, planning delete UX — omniflow external profile post-Q0020

alternatives_considered: Reopen BUG-0013 — rejected (DONE Q0020; operator reports residual symptoms after rebuild, not unreleased fix)
New story for native-currency display — rejected for intake; fold pricing/display gap into AP/AQ sub-defects pending discovery
Split ML into US-0013 follow-up — rejected (US-0013 DONE; defect is sidecar not started on operator compose up)
